## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss performance reporting, content strategy, and new website features.](https://fathom.video/share/qJcys_d1bx8wyRKdxZRpHW-SofnQyFvz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New automated Looker Studio report implemented for real-time performance tracking, including LLM referral traffic](https://fathom.video/share/qJcys_d1bx8wyRKdxZRpHW-SofnQyFvz?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [Significant increase in traffic from AI/LLM sources, outperforming other referral channels](https://fathom.video/share/qJcys_d1bx8wyRKdxZRpHW-SofnQyFvz?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Plans to create new pillar content for capabilities pages to boost rankings and internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/qJcys_d1bx8wyRKdxZRpHW-SofnQyFvz?tab=summary&timestamp=1439.0)
  - [Upcoming focus on content refreshes, rewrites, and potential new content directions](https://fathom.video/share/qJcys_d1bx8wyRKdxZRpHW-SofnQyFvz?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)

## Topics

### Automated Performance Reporting

  - [New Looker Studio report automates weekly performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/qJcys_d1bx8wyRKdxZRpHW-SofnQyFvz?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [Includes data from Google Search Console and Google Analytics 4](https://fathom.video/share/qJcys_d1bx8wyRKdxZRpHW-SofnQyFvz?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Real-time updates with customizable date ranges](https://fathom.video/share/qJcys_d1bx8wyRKdxZRpHW-SofnQyFvz?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [Added LLM referral traffic tracking for entire website](https://fathom.video/share/qJcys_d1bx8wyRKdxZRpHW-SofnQyFvz?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Perplex City driving traffic to their own page noted as interesting](https://fathom.video/share/qJcys_d1bx8wyRKdxZRpHW-SofnQyFvz?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)

### AI/LLM Referral Traffic

  - [Significant increase in traffic from AI sources, outperforming other referrals](https://fathom.video/share/qJcys_d1bx8wyRKdxZRpHW-SofnQyFvz?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [No direct conversion impact observed yet, but positive for overall traffic](https://fathom.video/share/qJcys_d1bx8wyRKdxZRpHW-SofnQyFvz?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Potential to explore optimization strategies for LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/qJcys_d1bx8wyRKdxZRpHW-SofnQyFvz?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Mentioned "Profound" agency specializing in LLM rankings (not currently engaged)](https://fathom.video/share/qJcys_d1bx8wyRKdxZRpHW-SofnQyFvz?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)

### Content Strategy and Website Performance

  - [Positive growth in impressions and clicks since site changes (weeks 2-7 of 2025)](https://fathom.video/share/qJcys_d1bx8wyRKdxZRpHW-SofnQyFvz?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [Current focus on content refreshes, rewrites, and enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/qJcys_d1bx8wyRKdxZRpHW-SofnQyFvz?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [Plans to start new content creation after current refresh cycle](https://fathom.video/share/qJcys_d1bx8wyRKdxZRpHW-SofnQyFvz?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [Exploring non-blog content formats for diversification](https://fathom.video/share/qJcys_d1bx8wyRKdxZRpHW-SofnQyFvz?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)

### New Website Feature: Embedded Pillar Content

  - [New component for capabilities pages to boost rankings](https://fathom.video/share/qJcys_d1bx8wyRKdxZRpHW-SofnQyFvz?tab=summary&timestamp=1439.0)
  - [FAQ-style rich text component with internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/qJcys_d1bx8wyRKdxZRpHW-SofnQyFvz?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
  - [Aims to rank capabilities pages higher than individual blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/qJcys_d1bx8wyRKdxZRpHW-SofnQyFvz?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
  - [Content length target: 600-750 words per pillar](https://fathom.video/share/qJcys_d1bx8wyRKdxZRpHW-SofnQyFvz?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)
  - [Consultative, advisory tone for pillar content](https://fathom.video/share/qJcys_d1bx8wyRKdxZRpHW-SofnQyFvz?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)
  - [Will be implemented across multiple capability pages](https://fathom.video/share/qJcys_d1bx8wyRKdxZRpHW-SofnQyFvz?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)

### Content Management in Sanity CMS

  - [Demonstrated use of conversion panels and shared modules](https://fathom.video/share/qJcys_d1bx8wyRKdxZRpHW-SofnQyFvz?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [Options for customizing copy, headlines, and CTAs in conversion panels](https://fathom.video/share/qJcys_d1bx8wyRKdxZRpHW-SofnQyFvz?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Various panel variants available (downloadable asset, client story, brand, internal, newsletter)](https://fathom.video/share/qJcys_d1bx8wyRKdxZRpHW-SofnQyFvz?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
  - [Shared CTAs can be used to simplify content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/qJcys_d1bx8wyRKdxZRpHW-SofnQyFvz?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

  - [Explore potential new content directions with input from new Managing Director, Jacob](https://fathom.video/share/qJcys_d1bx8wyRKdxZRpHW-SofnQyFvz?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)
